description: Populate config policy layer — discovers categories, fetches library profiles, and resolves scope assignments. EXPENSIVE: cost ≈ 1 + P + P × (SC + S + G). Pass --category to limit to one category; pass --scope-id together with --scope-type (org|collection|site|group) to limit assignment resolution to a single scope.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Only refresh this config category (e.g. wlan-ssids, sw-port-profiles).

parameters.name: scope-id
parameters.description: Restrict assignment resolution to this scope id.

parameters.name: scope-type
parameters.description: Scope type for --scope-id (org, collection, site, or group).
